header.openRepositoryAria: Open Frontend Radar repository on GitHub

page.label: Repository analysis
page.title: Frontend project health overview
page.description: Analyze repository quality, tooling, testing, documentation and delivery readiness in a single dashboard.

analysisInfo.title: How the analysis works
analysisInfo.description: The report is assembled from repository data that can be checked consistently: project files, package metadata, quality tooling and delivery configuration.

repository.title: Read the repository context
repository.description: Frontend Radar starts with the repository structure, package metadata, default branch, license, README and other files that describe how the project is maintained.

signals.title: Detect frontend quality signals
signals.description: The analyzer looks for scripts, TypeScript and bundler setup, linting, formatting, testing, CI/CD, dependency metadata and documentation coverage.

metrics.title: Build the score breakdown
metrics.description: Signals are grouped into report sections so the result shows not only the final health score, but also which areas are strong and which need attention.

recommendations.title: Prioritize next steps
recommendations.description: The final report turns weak signals into practical recommendations, ordered by impact on project maintainability and delivery readiness.

reportFallback.title: Report not found
reportFallback.description: This report is not available yet. Start a new analysis from the dashboard overview.

reportLoading.title: Loading report
reportLoading.description: Frontend Radar is checking the analysis status.

reportProcessing.label: Repository analysis
reportProcessing.title: Analysis in progress
reportProcessing.description: The report is being assembled from GitHub repository signals.

reportError.title: Report could not be loaded
reportError.description: Frontend Radar could not load this report. You can start a new analysis from the form above.

reportFailed.title: Analysis failed
reportFailed.description: Repository analysis failed. Start a new analysis when you are ready.

analysisFailed.title: Analysis failed
analysisFailed.description: Frontend Radar could not finish the repository analysis. Check the repository input and try again.

githubRateLimited.title: GitHub rate limit reached
githubRateLimited.description: GitHub API rejected the request because the rate limit was reached. Check the configured token or try again later.

githubUnavailable.title: Could not reach GitHub
githubUnavailable.description: GitHub API did not respond during analysis. Check the connection, token access or try again later.

projectPathNotFound.title: Frontend path was not found
projectPathNotFound.description: package.json was not found in the selected frontend path. Check the path and start a new analysis.

repositoryForbidden.title: Repository access is blocked
repositoryForbidden.description: The repository is private or the configured GitHub token does not have access to it.

repositoryNotFound.title: Repository was not found
repositoryNotFound.description: GitHub could not find this repository. Check the owner, repository name and selected branch.

repositoryVerificationFailed.title: Repository could not be verified
repositoryVerificationFailed.description: Frontend Radar could not verify the repository before analysis. Check GitHub access and try again.

error.title: Could not restart analysis
error.description: Frontend Radar could not restart this analysis. Try again later or start a new analysis manually.

completed.title: Using the current report
completed.description: The repository has not changed since the latest completed analysis, so Frontend Radar reused the existing report.

active.title: Analysis already in progress
active.description: An analysis for this repository commit is already running, so Frontend Radar opened the existing run.

retried.title: Retrying analysis
retried.description: The previous attempt for this repository commit failed, so Frontend Radar restarted the analysis.

upToDate.title: Report is up to date
upToDate.description: The repository latest commit has not changed, so no new analysis run was created.

error.title: Refresh failed
error.description: Frontend Radar could not check the latest repository commit. Try again later.

healthScore.label: Frontend Health Score
healthScore.title: Overall project quality
healthScore.description: This score summarizes repository setup, documentation, testing, CI/CD, dependencies and maintainability signals.

comparison.label: Comparison
comparison.title: Changes since previous report
comparison.description: Compare the current completed report with the previous completed report for the same repository.
comparison.manualDescription: Compare the current completed report with the selected previous run from history.
comparison.noChangesDescription: Score, metrics, checks and recommendations match the previous completed report.
